entries.title: Freight Entrance Manifest
entries.summary: Shift logs confirm imperial supply wagons now move under reinforced escort through the lower passage.

entries.title: Checkpoint Sensor Report
entries.summary: The route scanner rotates every forty seconds, leaving a brief blind corridor near the east scaffolds.

entries.title: Refinery Alarm Relay
entries.summary: Alert relays can be rerouted from this node to delay patrol convergence in the refinery spine.

entries.title: Reception Archive Index
entries.summary: Valleys family files are split across upper archive partitions guarded by priest verification seals.

entries.title: Supervisor Office Ledger
entries.summary: A confiscated sigil register links your bloodline to the tower archive relocation order.

entries.title: Luminous Grid Control
entries.summary: This panel toggles L3-L4 illumination banks and can create a stealth corridor through the meeting wing.

entries.title: Core Exile Record
entries.summary: The archive confirms the exile decree was fabricated by council operatives to erase succession claims.

entries.title: Perimeter Security Feed
entries.summary: Outer cameras are synchronized with drone sweeps, but their handoff windows drift during coolant cycling.

entries.title: Gene Lab Trial Notes
entries.summary: Trial entries map Saqueos response thresholds and identify the sectors with unstable containment.

entries.title: Research Lift Override
entries.summary: The lift firmware can be forced into maintenance mode to isolate patrol routes between lab tiers.

entries.title: Experiment Core Log
entries.summary: Signed directives tie command leadership to live-field Saqueos deployment and civilian suppression.

entries.title: Temple Outer Roster
entries.summary: Guard rosters reveal rotating gaps on the north shrine ring shortly after shift bell transitions.

entries.title: Transit Channel Dispatch
entries.summary: Courier traffic is redirected through hidden conduit lines when core alerts exceed threshold two.

entries.title: Priest Cipher Annex
entries.summary: Partial decryption of priest traffic exposes fallback rituals tied to the final solar sanctum.

entries.title: Core Thread Registry
entries.summary: The core registry confirms branching outcomes are pre-scripted unless the terminal key is overwritten.

entries.title: Outer Checkpoint Dossier
entries.summary: Checkpoint audits list purge teams staged behind ceremonial gates for rapid final-sector lockdown.

entries.title: Mid Tier Light Matrix
entries.summary: Lighting subgrids can be inverted to break long-angle sightlines across the central balcony routes.

entries.title: Priest Communications Trace
entries.summary: Intercepted priest channels confirm internal dissent and reveal blind trust boundaries around Taki.

entries.title: Solar Array Directive
entries.summary: Array calibration commands can force staggered blackouts, creating short windows for final advance.

entries.title: Final Decision Kernel
entries.summary: The kernel records the imperial contingency order and accepts an irreversible branch selection input.
